creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
According to stage-qa, we are missing a few LIB_DEPENDS.

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/lib/libserf-1.so.1.3.0 is linked to /usr/local/lib/libdb-18.1.so from databases/db18 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libdb-18.1.so:databases/db18
Error: /usr/local/lib/libserf-1.so.1.3.0 is linked to /usr/local/lib/libgdbm.so.6 from databases/gdbm but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libgdbm.so:databases/gdbm
Error: /usr/local/lib/libserf-1.so.1.3.0 is linked to /usr/local/lib/libexpat.so.1 from textproc/expat2 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libexpat.so:textproc/expat2

These aren't false positives.

root@15amd64-default:~ # readelf -a /usr/local/lib/libserf-1.so.1.3.0 | grep -Ei 'NEEDED.*(libdb|libgdbm|libexpat)'
 0x0000000000000001 NEEDED               Shared library: [libdb-18.1.so]
 0x0000000000000001 NEEDED               Shared library: [libgdbm.so.6]
 0x0000000000000001 NEEDED               Shared library: [libexpat.so.1]
